summary: The root app shell, HealthBadge, and SetupPage now use shared shell/primitives and no longer depend on the old landing-page layout.

checks.name: CHECK-01: Hero and checkpoint cards removed
checks.command: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; t=Path('frontend/src/App.tsx').read_text(); print('className=\"hero\"' not in t and 'const checkpoints' not in t)"

checks.name: CHECK-02: App uses AppLayout and SimpleGrid
checks.actual: App.tsx renders AppLayout with two SimpleGrid sections.

checks.name: CHECK-03: HealthBadge and SetupPage use StatusBadge
checks.actual: Both files use StatusBadge for health/session state rendering.

checks.name: CHECK-04: Legacy health/setup classes removed
checks.command: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; t1=Path('frontend/src/components/HealthBadge.tsx').read_text(); t2=Path('frontend/src/pages/SetupPage.tsx').read_text(); print('health-panel' not in t1 and 'setup-card' not in t2)"

checks.name: CHECK-05: Frontend build passes
checks.actual: Build succeeded after entry surface migration and at final verification.
